titleStmt.title: SII 20.69: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 69. (B.K. No. 61 of 1936-37.) KOṆḌGŪḶI, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: First face of a broken pillar set up on the bund of the well outside the village.

summary.p: This badly damaged record is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 33, Sarvajit, Mārggasira, Āmāvāsyā, Monday, solar eclipse, regularly corresponding to A.D. 1107, December 16.

This inscription is in two fragments and registers a gift of land, measured by the Bandhuchintāmaṇi pole, by Mahāpradhāna, Daṇḍanāyaka Kēsirājarasa of the Vāji-kuḷa to the temple of Sōmēśvara constructed by him at Koṇḍaguḷi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© Ōṁ namaḥ śivāya . nama
worn out
gaḷurvvigema sidanā nripōttamaniṁ traiḷō
kyamallanāhavamallaṁ . svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī
prithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara pa
ramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyā
bharaṇaṁ śrīmatṛbhuvanamalladēvara vijayarā
jyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamā
candrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttaṁ kalyāṇapurada
nelevīḍinoḷsukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁge
yyuttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigata
pañcamahāśabda mahāsāmantādhipa
ti mahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ vibdhavara
dāyaka gōtrapavitra sujanaika
mitra Abhimānamandara vibhavapuraṁdara sarasvatīgaṇa
lalāṭapaṭṭa kannakairadiśāpaṭṭa vājikuḷāṁ
baradyumaṇi bandhujanacintāmaṇi śrī
matṛbhuvanamalladēvapadārādhakaṁ pa
kanāmādisamastapraśastisahita
manumahāpradhānaṁ maneverggeḍe daṁḍa
baṇayyaṁgaḷ rāyanārāyaṇapu
yudyāpanadalu keṟeya purado
dharmmamāgi śrīmatṛbhuvanama
lu dhārāpūrvva
śyadagrahā

māgire paḍeda sahi
koṇḍaṁguḷiyalu niṁba
gaḷa maga © svasti samadhigatapañca
mahāśabda mahāsāmantādhipati(ma)
mahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyaka duṣṭavidviṣṭa
vithēyaka vājikuḷārṇnavapārijāta
sukaviśukacūta bandhuvanavasanta vacaśrīvadhū
kānta sāhityasarōruhamadhubrata satyasa
tyabrata haracaraṇarajōraṁjitōttamāṁgana
yyanasiṁga nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpra
dhānaṁ hērilāḷasandhivigrahi daṇḍanāyakaṁ kēsirā
jarasaru © śrīmacāḷkyavikramavarṣada 33 ne
ya sarvvajit saṁtsarada mārggasiradamāvāsye
sōmavāradaṁdina sūryyagrahaṇaparvvanimittadalu
tāvu māḍisida śivāleyada mūlasthānada
śrī sōmēśvaradēvargge tamma prabhutvada dōṇiyiṁ
teṁka Oḍḍavāḍigeya baṭṭeyiṁ pa
ḍuva bandhucintāmaṇiya Īrppatteṁṭu gēṇa kō
lalu tammaṁśakke baṁda mattarayvattēḷaṟoḷagoThe record stops here.
Digital edition of SII 20.69 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
